creator: andrews@TECHNOLOGIST.COM
text:
See pkg/DESCR. I couldn't get the simple
main.cpp program to compile with the libPaintLib
library installed.. I think maybe it's because
that program is based on an older version of
Qt 2, OR we have an old version of Qt 2.

Nevertheless, the library compiles and installs
just fine.

How-To-Repeat: 
Use the shar below to commit the port to the tree.
